title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. macedonica
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. macedonica, also known as Macedonian orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as respiratory issues and inflammation due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. macedonica include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs and colds, and act as an antiseptic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety in modern medicine.
